items.name: Create Patrolling Enemy Actor
items.description: Spawn an enemy actor with patrol points and set up movement between waypoints

steps.purpose: Spawn enemy actor in level
Add InterpToMovementComponent for patrol
Configure patrol points and behaviour type to PING_PONG
Position enemy at patrol start location
Ensure NavMesh covers patrol area

items.expectedOutcome: An enemy actor that automatically patrols between waypoints using InterpToMovement

items.name: Blueprint Health and Damage System
items.description: Create a reusable health component Blueprint with damage events and death logic

steps.purpose: Create HealthComponent Blueprint class
Add MaxHealth and CurrentHealth float variables
Add TakeDamage event node
Connect damage input to health subtraction math
Add death check branch and OnDeath dispatcher
Wire branch output to death event dispatch

items.expectedOutcome: A reusable HealthComponent Blueprint that tracks HP, responds to damage, and fires death events

items.name: Create Tri-Planar Projection Material
items.description: Build a master material using world-aligned texture projections on all three axes for seamless tiling on irregular meshes

steps.purpose: Create new master material asset
Import albedo, normal, and roughness textures
Assign textures to material texture parameters
Add WorldAlignedTexture nodes for X, Y, Z projections
Blend three projections using absolute world normal
Verify node graph is correctly wired

items.expectedOutcome: A tri-planar master material that tiles seamlessly on any mesh without visible seams

items.name: Set Up Locomotion Blend Space
items.description: Configure a 2D blend space for character locomotion blending idle, walk, and run animations based on speed and direction

steps.purpose: Verify skeleton compatibility with animations
List available locomotion animation sequences
Open or inspect existing blend space asset
Add blend space player node in AnimGraph
Wire Speed and Direction variables to blend space inputs

items.expectedOutcome: A functional 2D blend space driving smooth locomotion transitions based on character velocity

items.name: Configure Level Streaming with Sublevels
items.description: Set up a persistent level with streaming sublevels for open-world performance optimization

steps.purpose: Open the persistent master level
Add sublevel for zone A
Add sublevel for zone B
Verify world settings and streaming method
Save all level changes

items.expectedOutcome: A persistent level with correctly configured streaming sublevels that load based on player proximity

items.name: Create Ambient Soundscape with Attenuation
items.description: Import ambient audio, create a sound cue with attenuation settings for realistic 3D spatial audio in an outdoor environment
prerequisites: WAV audio files for ambient sounds

steps.purpose: Import ambient WAV files into content browser
Create a sound cue combining ambient layers
Configure 3D attenuation with falloff curve
Spawn AmbientSound actor in level
Assign sound cue and enable auto-activate

items.expectedOutcome: A spatially accurate ambient soundscape that attenuates realistically with distance

items.name: Create Fire Particle Effect with Niagara
items.description: Build a realistic fire VFX system using Niagara with sprite-based flames, ember particles, and heat distortion

steps.purpose: Create new Niagara particle system for fire
Add sprite emitter for base flames
Add sprite emitter for rising embers
Set flame color, size, and lifetime parameters
Configure ember velocity and turbulence
Compile the Niagara system
Verify system properties and emitter count

items.expectedOutcome: A realistic multi-layer fire effect with flames and embers ready to place in levels

items.name: Create HUD Widget with Health Bar
items.description: Build a UMG HUD widget displaying player health as a progress bar with dynamic color changes
prerequisites: Player character Blueprint with health variable

steps.purpose: Create new WBP_HUD Widget Blueprint
Add Canvas Panel as root container
Add Progress Bar widget for health display
Configure progress bar fill color and style
Verify binding connections to player health variable
Add Create Widget node in player Blueprint to spawn HUD
Wire BeginPlay to create and add HUD to viewport

items.expectedOutcome: A functional HUD widget that displays and updates player health as a colored progress bar

items.name: Create and Paint Landscape Terrain
items.description: Create a large landscape, import a heightmap, and apply a multi-layer landscape material

steps.purpose: Create new landscape with desired resolution
Import heightmap data to shape terrain
Assign multi-layer landscape material
Verify landscape bounds and material assignment
Build lighting after terrain placement

items.expectedOutcome: A detailed landscape with correct heightmap shape and painted material layers ready for content placement

items.name: Create In-Game Cutscene with Sequencer
items.description: Build a cinematic cutscene using Level Sequence with camera cuts, actor animations, and audio tracks

steps.purpose: Create a new Level Sequence asset
Open sequence in Sequencer editor
Add camera actor binding
Add camera cut track for camera management
Add character actor bindings
Add animation track for character movement
Add audio track for scene music and dialogue
Set keyframes for camera and character transforms
Review sequence duration and track configuration

items.expectedOutcome: A polished in-game cutscene with camera cuts, animated characters, and synchronized audio

items.name: Configure Mesh LODs and Collision
items.description: Set up LOD levels and generate accurate collision for a static mesh to optimize performance

steps.purpose: Inspect current mesh LOD and collision settings
Configure LOD 0 through LOD 3 reduction percentages
Generate convex hull collision for the mesh
Verify and assign LOD-appropriate material slots
Check mesh complexity and LOD effectiveness

items.expectedOutcome: A static mesh with properly configured LOD levels and collision ready for efficient runtime use

items.name: Set Up Character Ragdoll Physics
items.description: Create a physics asset for a character skeleton to enable ragdoll death simulation

steps.purpose: Inspect existing physics asset if any
Create new physics asset for character skeleton
Create physical material for body mass settings
Configure joint constraints for realistic limb limits
Assign ragdoll physics profile to character
Add SetAllBodiesSimulatePhysics node in death event

items.expectedOutcome: A character with full ragdoll physics that activates upon death for realistic simulation

items.name: Set Up Forest Foliage Biome
items.description: Create foliage types for trees, bushes, and ground cover and configure density and culling settings
prerequisites: Tree and bush static mesh assets

steps.purpose: Create foliage type for large trees
Set tree density, scale range, and cull distances
Create foliage type for ground cover
Configure ground cover density and alignment to surface
Verify foliage type count and coverage settings
Check foliage performance impact

items.expectedOutcome: A configured foliage system with realistic forest density and proper LOD culling distances

items.name: Procedural City Block with PCG
items.description: Use PCG to procedurally scatter buildings along a spline-defined road network

steps.purpose: Create new PCG graph for city generation
Add SplineSampler node to sample along road splines
Add StaticMeshSpawner node for building placement
Add AttributeNoise node for placement variation
Connect spline sampler through noise to mesh spawner
Inspect graph execution and output point count

items.expectedOutcome: A PCG graph that procedurally places building meshes along road splines with randomized variation

items.name: Import and Configure Texture Assets
items.description: Import a texture set (albedo, normal, roughness, metallic) and configure compression and mip settings

steps.purpose: Import albedo/diffuse texture
Set albedo compression to DXT1 or BC7
Import normal map texture
Set normal map compression to BC5
Import roughness and metallic textures
Set linear data textures to BC4 or BC5
List all imported textures to verify

items.expectedOutcome: A properly imported and compressed texture set ready for material assignment

items.name: Create Enemy AI with Behavior Tree
items.description: Build a complete enemy AI system with blackboard, behavior tree, and EQS for target detection

steps.purpose: Create blackboard asset for AI variables
Add TargetActor object key
Add PatrolLocation vector key
Create behavior tree with patrol and attack sequences
Create EQS query to find player within sight radius
Configure navigation mesh for AI movement
Verify behavior tree structure and blackboard connection

items.expectedOutcome: A fully functional enemy AI that patrols, detects players via EQS, and transitions to attack behavior

items.name: Create Item Database with DataTable
items.description: Build an item database using a DataTable with rows for weapons, armor, and consumables
prerequisites: FItemData struct defined in C++ or Blueprint

steps.purpose: Create DataTable asset with FItemData row structure
Add row for Sword with damage, weight, rarity
Add row for Health Potion with heal amount and cooldown
Add row for Iron Armor with defense and durability
Verify all rows and data integrity
Validate DataTable asset for errors

items.expectedOutcome: A populated DataTable serving as a game item database for inventory and loot systems

items.name: Create Easing Curves for UI Animation
items.description: Create float curves for elastic and bounce easing to drive smooth UI widget animations

steps.purpose: Create new float curve asset for ease-in-out
Set keyframes with cubic tangents for smooth interpolation
Create bounce easing float curve
Set keyframes for bounce overshoot effect
Verify curve key values and interpolation types
Add GetFloatValue node to sample curve in widget animation

items.expectedOutcome: Reusable easing curves that drive smooth and expressive UI widget animations

items.name: Set Up Enhanced Input System
items.description: Configure Enhanced Input actions and mappings for character movement, jump, and interaction

steps.purpose: Verify game mode and pawn class setup
Create IA_Move input action for WASD movement
Create IA_Jump input action for spacebar
Create IA_Interact input action for E key
List all input actions to verify configuration
Add Enhanced Input Action nodes in player Blueprint
Wire input events to movement and jump functions

items.expectedOutcome: A fully configured Enhanced Input system with actions for movement, jumping, and interaction

items.name: Content Browser Asset Audit
items.description: Scan content browser for unused assets, validate asset health, and identify references

steps.purpose: List all assets in content browser
Find assets matching specific criteria or folders
Run health analysis to find broken references
Check references for potentially orphaned assets
Validate all assets for errors and warnings
Review log for any asset loading errors

items.expectedOutcome: A complete audit report of content assets with broken references and unused assets identified

items.name: Debug Performance Issues
items.description: Use console commands and performance tools to diagnose and identify frame rate bottlenecks

steps.purpose: Get current frame time, GPU time, and CPU time
Run stat fps and stat scenerendering
Run ProfileGPU to capture GPU frame profile
Analyze scene for performance hints and warnings
Check output log for performance warnings
Check viewport render settings and show flags

items.expectedOutcome: A clear picture of performance bottlenecks with GPU and CPU cost breakdowns

items.name: Cook and Package Game Content
items.description: Cook content for a target platform, run map checks, and build final lighting before packaging

steps.purpose: Run map check to find errors and warnings
Validate all content before cooking
Build final production lighting
Cook content for target platform
Review cook log for errors or missing assets

items.expectedOutcome: Successfully cooked and validated game content ready for packaging and distribution

items.name: Migrate and Rename Asset Folder Structure
items.description: Reorganize content folder by renaming assets, updating references, and migrating to new structure

steps.purpose: List current asset structure and paths
Check references before renaming to understand impact
Rename assets to follow new naming convention
Duplicate assets to new folder structure if needed
Validate assets after rename to ensure no broken refs
Verify source control tracks all renamed files

items.expectedOutcome: A clean, consistently named content structure with all references properly updated

items.name: Boolean Mesh Operations with GeoScript
items.description: Use GeoScript to perform subtract and intersect boolean operations between meshes to create archways and openings

steps.purpose: Inspect GeoScript plugin availability and version
Get source mesh bounds and polygon count
Perform subtract boolean to cut archway opening
Apply transform to align result mesh
Regenerate collision on the resulting mesh
Reassign materials to boolean result mesh

items.expectedOutcome: A new mesh created by boolean subtraction with correct topology, collision, and materials

items.name: Configure World Partition for Open World
items.description: Set up World Partition with data layers, HLOD generation, and streaming configuration for large open worlds

steps.purpose: Inspect current World Partition configuration
Configure cell size and loading range

Create data layer for nighttime objects
Generate HLOD for distant terrain and buildings
Run map check for World Partition issues

items.expectedOutcome: A World Partition configured open world with data layers and HLODs for scalable streaming

items.name: Generate Custom Slate Editor Tool
items.description: Create a custom Slate-based editor tool using templates for asset batch editing workflows

steps.purpose: List available Slate widget templates
Generate Slate widget from property editor template
Validate generated Slate code for syntax errors
Trigger compilation of new Slate code
Check compilation progress
Review any compilation errors

items.expectedOutcome: A functional custom Slate editor panel compiled and accessible in the Unreal Editor

items.name: Auto-Heal Compilation Errors

Apply self-healing to resolve known error patterns
Re-trigger compilation after fixes
Verify compilation succeeded after self-heal

items.expectedOutcome: Compilation errors automatically identified and resolved, resulting in a successful build

items.name: Take and Review Project Snapshot

Review module dependencies
Capture full project snapshot to file

items.name: Refactor and Rename Actor Class Chain

steps.purpose: Map out class hierarchy before renaming
Find all assets referencing the class
Check out all affected files for editing
Execute rename chain across C++ and Blueprint files
Compile to verify rename is clean
Check for any remaining reference errors

items.expectedOutcome: A class successfully renamed with all references updated and no compilation errors

items.name: Batch Actor Configuration via Python

Verify level actor count after batch operation

items.expectedOutcome: All matching actors in the level have been batch configured via Python automation

items.name: Blueprint Code Quality Audit
items.description: Analyze all Blueprints for complexity issues, code convention violations, and performance concerns

Analyze complexity metrics for each Blueprint
Check naming and coding convention compliance
Identify performance anti-patterns in Blueprints
Check Blueprint asset health and broken nodes
Review analysis log for critical issues

items.expectedOutcome: A comprehensive Blueprint audit report with complexity scores and actionable improvement suggestions

items.name: Create Third-Person Playable Character

Position character at player start

items.expectedOutcome: A playable third-person character with working movement, camera, and input mapping

items.name: Set Up Multiplayer Game Session

Enable replication on player state variables

Run map check for replication issues

items.name: Create and Animate Dynamic Material Instance
items.description: Create a material instance and animate its parameters at runtime for effects like hit flashing or glowing

steps.purpose: List available parameters in the master material
Create material instance from master material
Set initial emissive and color parameter values
Add CreateDynamicMaterialInstance node in Blueprint
Add Timeline node for parameter animation over time
Wire timeline float output to SetVectorParameterValue

items.expectedOutcome: A dynamic material instance that animates emissive and color parameters for hit and glow effects

items.name: Create Procedural Audio with MetaSound

Add surface type switch in MetaSound graph
Route surface parameter to correct sound wave player
Set spatialization and distance attenuation

items.expectedOutcome: A MetaSound that dynamically selects and plays footstep variations based on the surface material

items.name: Build Inventory Grid Widget

items.description: Build an emissive neon material with HDR bloom, color variation, and animated flicker
prerequisites: Neon sign mesh with separate emissive material slots

steps.purpose: Create emissive unlit material for neon tubes
Set emissive color and intensity as scalar parameters
Add Sine node for animated flicker frequency
Add Multiply node to modulate emissive intensity
Wire sine output to emissive multiplier
Create red, blue, and green neon color instances
Assign color instances to correct neon tube mesh slots

items.expectedOutcome: A set of animated neon material instances with HDR emissive output that flicker realistically

items.name: Import Motion Capture via Sequencer FBX
items.description: Import motion capture FBX data into a Level Sequence and retarget it to the game character skeleton
prerequisites: Game character skeleton with IK retargeter

steps.purpose: Create Level Sequence for mocap import
Open sequence in Sequencer editor
Add character actor binding to sequence
Import mocap FBX into sequence tracks
Verify imported animation track length and frame rate
Confirm skeleton compatibility after import

items.expectedOutcome: Mocap animation data imported and applied to the game character via Level Sequence tracks

items.name: Export and Migrate Assets Between Projects
items.description: Export assets from one project and prepare them for migration into another UE5 project
prerequisites: Source project with assets to export

steps.purpose: Find all assets to export in source project
Map all dependencies for each export asset
Validate assets before export to catch errors
Export assets with all dependencies to export folder
Tag exported assets with version and source project info
Verify export folder contains all expected files

items.expectedOutcome: A clean asset export package with all dependencies included, ready for import into another project

items.name: Review Recent Editor Activity and Changes
items.description: Audit recent editor activity to track which assets were modified, actors moved, or settings changed

steps.purpose: Get list of recently modified assets and operations
Check current level state and actor count
Get details on recently modified assets
Diff files to see exact content changes
Review log for any errors during recent operations

items.expectedOutcome: A clear picture of all recent editor changes enabling review and rollback decisions
